name: North Gate of Bree
description:
You are standing at the North Gate of Bree.  The gate has been blocked with
masonry and stone ever since trouble began brewing up north at Deadmans Dike.
The citizens think the gate is too close to the Dike to let it be so open to
attack.  Now the only directions you can take are to your south, back through
town and eventually to the Great East Road, or east, to the Bree cemetery.
